choice.title: Uhm, the bone job makes it highly unlikely.
You found me, now point me to the treasure.
choice.response: The only treasure you will find here is death!

choice.title: Here comes the pointless threats.
choice.response: The insolence in this one is strong!

choice.title: Tick, tock, I got a boner to kill.
I decide when my time is up.
choice.response: Simpleton, I am the timeless and I rule time!

choice.title: Go on, anything else you'd like to divulge?
And here it folds like a house of cards.
choice.response: You can't make me fold on my footprint!

choice.title: I hope your master's insurance covers you.
choice.response: You don't have to worry about that!

choice.title: I'll be the architect of your demise.
choice.response: You'll need more firepower than that!

choice.title: I'll turn you into a furnace if that's what it takes.
choice.response: I'm made from asbestos so good luck with that!

choice.title: Are we done with the mental gymnastics?

choices.title: Hahaha, keep feeding me with your anger!

choice.title: Why don't you just die?
choice.response: Because gamers killed all the simple bosses!
